Ghost Killer Weapon.name: Ghost Killer Weapon
Ghost Killer Weapon.description: The target weapon becomes translucent and ghostly, and it can affect material and incorporeal creatures and objects. It gains the effects of the ghost killer weapon upgrade, meaning it becomes magical if it wasn't already, is especially effective against incorporeal creatures, and can be wielded by a corporeal or incorporeal creature.

Avatar.name: 天神下凡 Avatar
Avatar.description:
你变形为你的神祇的化身，化作超大型战斗形态。在该战斗形态中你有手，并且能进行操作行动。你可以解消该法术。你获得后续数据和能力，无论你指定哪种战斗形态：

  • AC=25+你的等级。忽略你的护甲检定减值和速度减值。
  • 30临时生命值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 一个或多个有你的神祇特定的战斗形态的攻击，你只能使用这些@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{攻击 Strike}。你对这些攻击受训。你的攻击调整值是+33，并且你使用列出的伤害。近战攻击基于力量（例如对于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled} 的情况）除非具有娴熟特征，所有的远程攻击都基于敏捷。
  • 运动调整值+35，除非你本身调整值更高。

你也会获得你的神祇列出的特定能力：

  • 阿巴达尔 Abadar
    • 速度 50尺，掘地速度 30尺，免疫@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized};
    • 远程 a 手弩（射程 120尺，装填1）, 伤害 6d10+3 穿刺.
  • 阿卡艾克克 Achaekek
    • 速度 70 尺, 攀爬速度 50 尺, 忽视困难地形和极难地形的影响;
    • 近战 a 螳螂爪 （灵巧, 回摆, 娴熟, 15尺触及, 多用 P), 伤害 6d8+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 刺齐射 （射程 60 尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 穿刺
  • 阿斯莫蒂斯 Asmodeus
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术;
    • 近战 a 硬头锤（触及15尺）, 伤害 6d10+6 钝击;
    • 远程 a 地狱烈焰（射程120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 火焰.
  • 卡莉丝翠 Calistria
    • 速度 30尺，飞行速度 70 尺;
    • 近战 a 长鞭（卸武，娴熟，非致命，触及20尺）, 伤害 6d4+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 醉人毒刺（射程60尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 毒素.
  • 凯登·凯连 Cayden Cailean
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术，忽视困难地形和高等困难地形;
    • 近战 a 细剑（致命3d8，触及15）, 伤害 6d6+6 穿刺;
    • 远程 a 麦酒泼溅（射程120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 毒素.
  • 黛丝娜 Desna
    • 速度 30尺，飞行速度 70尺;
    • 近战 a 星匕首（灵巧，致命3d4，触及15尺，银，投掷60尺）, 伤害 6d4+6 穿刺;
    • 远程 a 月亮射线（射程120尺，银）, 伤害 6d6+3 火焰.
  • 埃拉斯蒂尔 Erastil
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术，忽视困难地形和艰难地形;
    • 远程 a 长弓（致命3d8，射程增量150尺）, 伤害 6d8+3 穿刺.
  • 古拉姆 Gorum
    • 速度 70尺，免疫@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized};
    • 近战 a 巨剑（多用 穿刺，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d12+6 挥砍.
  • 哥兹莱 Gozreh
    • 没有地面速度，飞行速度 70尺，游泳速度 70尺；忽视困难地形和高等困难地形;
    • 近战 a 巨浪（推撞，触及15尺，投掷20尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 钝击;
    • 远程 a 狂风（多用 电击，射程120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 钝击.
  • 艾奥梅黛 Iomedae
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术；盾牌（15硬度，无法被伤害）;
    • 近战 a 长剑（多用 穿刺，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 挥砍.
  • 义洛理 Irori
    • 速度 80尺，飞行术;
    • 近战 a 解放打击（灵巧，多用 穿刺或挥砍，娴熟，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 钝击;
    • 远程 a 烈风突击（射程60尺）, 伤害 6d4+6 钝击.
  • 拉玛什图 Lamashtu
    • 速度 30尺，飞行速度 70尺;
    • 近战 a 弯刃大刀（叠劲，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d10+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 拉玛什图毒水（射程 120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 毒素.
  • 内希斯 Nethys
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术;
    • 远程 a 原初魔法（射程120尺；多用 寒冷，电击，火焰）, 伤害 6d6 力场.
  • 诺格巴 Norgorber
    • 速度 70尺，忽视困难地形和高等困难地形， 飞行术;
    • 近战 a 短剑（灵巧，娴熟，多用 挥砍，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d6+6 穿刺;
    • 远程 a 黑指之掷（射程 120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 毒素.
  • 法莱斯玛 Pharasma
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术;
    • 近战 a 匕首（灵巧，娴熟，触及15尺，投掷40尺）, 伤害 6d6+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 旋涡爆裂（射程 120尺，只伤害不死生物）, 伤害 6d8+3 命能.
  • 洛瓦古格 Rovagug
    • 速度 50尺，掘地速度 30尺，免疫@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized};
    • 近战 a 咬（触及15尺）, 伤害 6d12+6 穿刺;
    • 近战 a 节肢腿（灵巧，多用 穿刺，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 钝击.
  • 塞恩蕾 Sarenrae
    • 速度 30尺，飞行速度 70尺;
    • 近战 a 弯刀（蓄力，非致命，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d6+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 永恒烈焰（非致命，射程 120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 火焰.
  • 莎琳 Shelyn
    • 速度 70尺， 飞行术，忽视困难地形和高等困难地形;
    • 近战 a 大砍刀（致命3d8，非致命，触及20尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 唯美旋律，（非致命，射程 120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 音波.
  • 托拉格 Torag
    • 速度 50尺，掘地速度 30尺，免疫@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}; 盾牌（15硬度，无法被伤害）;
    • 近战 a 战锤（推撞，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 钝击.
  • 厄加图娅 Urgathoa
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术;
    • 近战 a 巨镰（致命3d10，摔绊，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d10+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 苍白瘟疫（射程 120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 虚能.
  • 宗-库山 Zon-Kuthon
    • 速度 70尺，飞行术，忽视困难地形和高等困难地形;
    • 近战 a 刺链（卸武，摔绊，触及15尺）, 伤害 6d8+6 挥砍;
    • 远程 a 午夜剧痛（心灵，非致命，射程120尺）, 伤害 6d6+3 心灵.

Quantum Negation.name: Quantum Negation
Quantum Negation.description:
You expose a target to a reality in which it's already dead, or never existed in the first place. Once targeted, the creature becomes temporarily immune for 1 minute. The effect of the spell depends on the target's level. If this spell brings a target of level 16 or lower to 0 Hit Points, it ceases to exist in this reality. At the GM's discretion, this may mean it's impossible to restore the target to life without the intervention of a deity, the wish ritual, or similar magic. A target of 17th level or higher merely dies instantly when this spell reduces it to 0 Hit Points, instead of being erased from reality. The target attempts a basic Will save. This spell's damage has no damage type.

13th or lower The target takes 9999 damage. It reduces the degree of success of its Will save by one step.

14th to 16th The target takes 25d10 damage.

17th or higher The target takes 20d10 damage.

Elemental Weapon.name: Elemental Weapon
Elemental Weapon.description:
You create an advanced, martial, or simple weapon out of elemental energy that materializes in the hands of a bonded creature. Select an elemental trait for the created weapon: air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood. The weapon is tactical grade and comes fully charged and loaded with basic ammunition. It cannot be made of any special materials.

The weapon has one fewer upgrade slot but can be upgraded with any upgrades you hold in your hands as a locus when casting this spell, which become inert until the spell ends. The weapon deals damage as normal plus 1d4 additional damage based on the chosen trait: electricity for air, bludgeoning for earth, fire for fire, acid for metal, cold for water, or poison for wood.

Heightened (2nd) You can create an advanced weapon.

Heightened (5th) You can create a superior weapon.

Heightened (6th) You can create an elite weapon.

Heightened (8th) You can create an ultimate weapon.

Heightened (9th) You can create a paragon weapon.

Share Life.name: 护卫分命 Share Life
Share Life.description: 你在目标和自身的生命力之间建立了一种临时连接。目标仅从所有造成生命值伤害的效果中受到一半伤害，你承受剩余部分的伤害。当你通过该链接承受伤害时，你对该伤害不会应用任何抗力，弱点或者其他能力；你仅承受该数值的伤害。如果目标与你的距离超过30尺，该法术结束。如果你或者目标降低到0生命值，在本法术的伤害结算后，该法术结束。

Infusion.name: Infusion
Infusion.description:
You infuse the target's essence with healing energy. If the target is a willing creature, you restore 1d6 Hit Points. The target is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 6.

3 You heal all bonded creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30].

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d6, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 6.

Mending.name: 修复术 Mending
Mending.description:
你修复目标物品。你回复目标每法术环级5点生命值，并且如果修复达到了物品的破损阈值，会移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{破损 Broken} 状态。你无法代替丢失的组成部分，或者修复已经完全损毁的物体。

升阶（2环级） 你能以1负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标。

升阶（3环级） 你能以2负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标，或者1负载或者更低的魔法物品为目标。

Remake.name: 回天再造 Remake
Remake.description:
你从无中重造一个物体，即使该物体被摧毁。要如此做，你必须能在意识中想象该物体的形象。除此之外，材料成分必须是该物品的残留部分，无论多小或者难以分辨均可（甚至从@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术 Disintegrate}遗留物中收集的产生的一小撮尘土也可以）。如果你想象的形象有过多猜测内容；如果该物体无法放进5尺立方空间；如果该物体仍然存在但你并不知晓；或者该物体是一件神器，具有超过20的等级，或者有类似的浩瀚魔法能量，均会导致法术失败。

该物品会以其完美状态重新组装。即使你的心灵印象是一件损坏的或者老旧的物体，新的物体也仍然是其完美的状态。如果该物体具有魔法，该法术也会回复其常驻魔法特性，但不包括临时的特性，例如充能和一次性消耗能力。具有充能和每日使用次数的能力在其被重造时所有充能和次数均被用尽，但是会在之后如常重填。

Cursed Metamorphosis.name: 恶咒变形术 Cursed Metamorphosis
Cursed Metamorphosis.description:
你尝试将目标生物变形为一种与所处地区相关的无害动物，该效果基于强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体会获得该无害生物的一些次要特征。其身体内部被这种部分变化所扰乱，获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。当它从恶心中恢复时，其形态恢复到正常状态。

失败 目标被变形，持续一分钟，但是会保留心智。它可以在自己的回合花费所有动作，专注于其本来的形态，这令它可以尝试一次@Check[will]豁免以结束该效果。

大失败 目标从身体到心灵被变形为选择的无害动物，持续时间无限。

Wall of Plasma.name: Wall of Plasma
Wall of Plasma.description:
You shape a wall of crackling plasma that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of plasma in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of plasma with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage and 2d6 persistent electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The persistent electricity damage increases by 1d6.

One with Plants.name: 融身化树 One with Plants
One with Plants.description:
你能选择变化为一株植物或者与植物物质融合。在变形后，你不能移动，也不能影响任何植物之外的任何事物，但你能够施法，前提是这些法术不需要植物外侧的效果线。你能解消该法术。

  • 与植物融合 法术持续时间为10分钟。当你施法时，你必须碰触1株体积足够容纳你和你的随身物品的植物，否则法术会被打断。在融入之后，你能听到、但不能看到这株植物外侧发生的事情。当你身处植物之内时，若植物承受伤害，你就会被驱逐至植物之外，并且承受10d6点伤害。魔法持续时间结束也会把你驱逐出去，但是不会造成伤害。当你离开植物之时，法术便会结束。
  • 变为植物 法术持续时间为8小时。你变为一株大型植物——通常是一颗树。察觉检定无法揭示出你的真实本质，但是成功通过自然或生存检定对抗你的法术DC，能够揭示出你化身的树木对于该地区来说是1株怪异的新出现的存在。当你处于该形态时，能够使用正常的感官观察自身周遭的一切事物。作为一株植物，你的AC为20，只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值和环境减值影响你。你在反射豁免中投掷出的任何成功和大成功都被视同为失败。

Commune with Tech.name: Commune with Tech
Commune with Tech.description:
You briefly establish a mystical connection between your mind and a piece of technology, allowing you to understand the object or manipulate its power. Choose any one of the following effects. An unwilling target must attempt a Will saving throw and negates the effect on a success.

  • Understand Tech You gain deep understanding of the target object or creature. For the next minute, you gain a +2 status bonus to skill checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.RF8xNJ8QsMwogerB]{Hack}, use, manipulate, disable, identify, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about, or otherwise interact with the target. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.q47pDFylqDY1VYEk]{Spell Effect: Commune with Tech}
  • Discharge Creature A creature with the tech trait becomes glitching 1 on a failed save, or glitching 2 on a critical failure.
  • Discharge Object The object loses all its remaining charges if its item level is up to your level minus 2. If the object is powered by electrical means but doesn't use charges, it instead loses power for 3 rounds. If the object's item level is greater than your level minus 2, it instead loses a single charge or powers down for 1 round.
  • Charge Object The object restores all its spent charges if its item level is up to your level minus 2. If the object is powered by electrical means but doesn't use charges, it instead becomes powered for 3 rounds. If the object's item level is greater than your level minus 2, it instead gains a single charge or becomes powered for 1 round.

Summon Giant.name: 召唤巨人 Summon Giant
Summon Giant.description:
你召唤一个具有巨人特征的生物为你而战，其等级为5或更低。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Holographic Memory.name: Holographic Memory
Holographic Memory.description:
You reach into the target's mind, extract a specific memory you have some awareness of, and project it into a hologram. Alternatively, when casting this spell, you can choose to pull a random memory left to the GM's discretion. The holographic memory can be no longer than 5 minutes; if the extracted memory is longer than this, the hologram simply ends at that point. The hologram includes audio as well as visual components, but it doesn't contain haptic, olfactory, or other components. The hologram typically plays a memory that takes place in a single scene, though it can cut to multiple scenes if they're accurate to the memory and its length allows. The hologram plays the memory exactly as the target experienced it and from the target's perspective, so it often lacks context.

This spell can target any living, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or deceased sentient creature with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher. If the target is deceased, it can't have been dead for longer than 1 week, or this spell fails; once a corpse has been subjected to holographic memory by any caster, any subsequent castings of holographic memory fail.

If the target is unwilling to share this memory, it can attempt a Will save to resist this spell.

Embed Message.name: 魔嘴藏信 Embed Message
Embed Message.description:
你指定一个触发条件和一段至多25词的信息。当特定的触发条件在目标30尺范围内发生时，你的信息的幻象会环绕目标，并伴随着不知何处来的声音。你可以选择你一个你知晓的语言用于文本和发声，并且可以选择声音听起来如何。当该信息结束，该法术结束。

升阶（4环级） 你可以增加一种简单感官成分来强化信息，例如气味，视觉效果，或者物理感觉。这种增加的感觉是明显的幻觉，并且仅当信息被阅读时才会持续。

升阶（6环级） 如同4环级，但是你可以选择该法术会重复多少次信息才会结束；重复的次数不受限制。

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或者更小的生物的幻象。它发出适当的声音，气味，触摸起来也非常可信。如果你和幻象相距超过500尺，法术结束。

幻象不能说话，但是你可以使用你的动作来通过该生物说话，法术会适当地掩饰你的声音。你可能要尝试欺骗或者表演检定来模仿该生物，由GM决定。如果你想表现一个特定的人，并与一个知晓该人的人交互时，很可能会如此。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合能使用2动作，它在你维持该法术时使用这些动作。它使用你的法术攻击调整值为其攻击骰，使用你的法术DC为其AC。其豁免骰调整值等于你的法术DC-10。它足够结实，以至于可以夹击其他生物。如果幻象被攻击命中，或者在豁免中失败，法术结束。

该幻术可以通过令目标相信来造成伤害，但它不能直接影响现实世界。如果幻象生物的打击命中，目标承受@Damage[3d4[mental]]伤害。这是一个心灵效果。幻象的打击是非致命的。如果伤害与怪物的幻象不对应——举例而言，如果幻象巨型龙只造成了5点伤害——GM可以允许目标通过一个自由动作尝试一次察觉检定来不相信法术。只要目标认为能，任何有关的抗力和弱点都会生效，这由GM判定。举例而言，如果幻影持用一把战锤，攻击一个具有钝击抗力的生物，该生物承受的心灵伤害会变少。但是，幻觉伤害不会抑制再生，或者触发其他需要特定伤害类型的能力。GM应当记录幻像造成的幻觉伤害。

当生物触摸幻像，或者使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}动作来检查它时，该生物可以尝试不相信你的幻术。当生物不相信幻术时，它回复从该幻术承受的伤害的一半（如果有），并且不会再因该幻术而承受伤害。

升阶（+1） 幻像的打击伤害增加1d4，你可以创造的生物最大体型增大一级（最大为巨型）。

Akashic Revival.name: Akashic Revival
Akashic Revival.description:
You dispatch perfect documentation of the target's physical body to the Akashic Record, allowing it to later recall this record and reconstruct its body as it was when you cast this spell. The record includes the target's current Hit Points, augmentations, attribute modifiers, and any afflictions or conditions it had.

If the target dies of anything other than old age, it can recall its recorded body from the Akashic Record. This process takes 1 minute, after which time its corpse disappears, and the target instantly reappears in the recorded body in the corpse's space and with any worn equipment. It re-forms standing and can choose to pick up any equipment it dropped in the space from when it died, assuming the equipment is still there. If it can't occupy that space, it appears as close to the space as possible, though it must still retrieve its equipment. It retains its mind as it was at the time of the body's death, so it regains no expended spells, Focus Points, or uses of special abilities. Any mental effects affecting the target at the time of its death persist in its new body.

Retrieving the body from the Akashic Record or having the duration expire removes the stored information from the Akashic Record, requiring you to cast this spell again.

Casting the spell replaces any previous record you've stored with prior castings—you can store only one copy of any creature in the Akashic Record using this spell.

Levitate.name: 浮空术 Levitate
Levitate.description:
你移去重力，令目标漂浮距离地面5尺。你可以通过维持法术来使目标上移或者下移10尺。因浮空术而漂浮的生物在攻击骰上承受-2环境减值。漂浮的生物可以花费一个交互动作来稳定自身，并在其回合剩余时间里取消该减值。如果目标邻接一个固定的物体，或者足够稳定的地形，他可以通过攀爬（如果平面是垂直的，例如一堵墙）或者匍匐（如果平面是水平的，例如天花板）沿着该平面移动。GM决定具体什么表面可以攀爬，什么表面应当匍匐。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.JqrTrvwV7pYStMXz]{法术效果：浮空术}

Wall of Steel.name: Wall of Steel
Wall of Steel.description:
You shape a wall of solid steel. You create a 4-inch-thick wall of steel up to 120 feet long and 20 feet high. You can shape the wall's path, placing each 5 feet of the wall on the border between squares. The wall doesn't need to stand vertically, so you can use it to form a bridge or set of stairs, for example. You must conjure the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 18, and 60 Hit Points, and it's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section of the wall can be moved through, but the rubble created from it is difficult terrain.

Heightened (+1) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 15.

Deafness.name: 耳聋术 Deafness
Deafness.description:
目标失去其听觉。它必须尝试一次强韧豁免，之后会暂时免疫1分钟。

大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}1轮。

失败 目标耳聋10分钟。

大失败 目标永久耳聋。

Vampiric Exsanguination.name: 血族驱命 Vampiric Exsanguination
Vampiric Exsanguination.description:
你伸出手臂，抽取其他生物的血液和生命力。你对区域内的每个活物造成12d6点虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。

你获得等于一个生物从该法术受到的伤害一半的临时生命值；计算该临时生命时，使用承受最多伤害的生物。你在1分钟后失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Chrono Push.name: Chrono Push
Chrono Push.description:
You push a creature across the battlefield so hard it slides through time. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, you knock the target back 15 feet in a straight line (30 feet on a critical hit). If the pushed creature makes contact with a solid barrier or another creature, its movement ends. At the end of this movement, the creature reenters the flow of time with a burst of temporal energy. The target and creatures now adjacent to the target take 7d8 force damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The force damage increases by 1d8.

Gust of Wind.name: 造风术 Gust of Wind
Gust of Wind.description:
一团暴风从你的掌中喷出，从你施放法术时所在位置直吹到线形终点。这团风吹灭所有小的非魔法火焰，吹散云和雾，吹起负载轻或者更低的物体，并且会推动更大的物体。区域中大型或者更小的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。在之后进入风中的大型或者更小的生物也必须在进入时尝试该豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物无法顶风移动。

失败 该生物@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。如果它在飞行，它改为承受大失败效果。

大失败 该生物被沿风向推离30尺，倒地，并且承受2d6钝击伤害。

Howl.name: Howl
Howl.description:
You let out a powerful ululation full of psychic resonance that compels others who hear it to join in. You deal 7d12 sonic damage and 1d8 persistent mental damage to other creatures who can hear within the area. Targets must attempt a Will save. The persistent mental damage a creature takes from this spell increases by 1d8 if at least one other creature is howling. A howling creature can't use auditory actions or cast spells except for those with the subtle trait for 1 round. Calculate the persistent damage after all creatures attempt their saves.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and no persistent mental damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, persistent mental damage, and is compelled to howl as long as it takes persistent mental damage.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target takes double the initial and persistent damage.

Silence.name: 沉默术 Silence
Silence.description:
目标不会发出声音，令生物无法通过仅通过听觉察觉到它。目标无法使用音波攻击，也不能使用听觉动作。由于施法中包含的魔法咒语，这也会令目标无法施法，除了晦匿法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.mmJNE57hC7G3SPae]{Spell Effect: Silence}

升阶（4环级） 该法术会产生以接触生物为中心的10尺灵光，沉默所有内部和通过的声音。在灵光范围内，生物受到和目标相同的效果。根据效果的位置，一个生物可能会注意到一团缺失的声音正在接近（例如，这阻挡了来自一场聚会的噪音）。

Force Barrage.name: 力场飞弹 Force Barrage
Force Barrage.description:
你发射出一道固态的魔力碎片，射向一个你能看见的生物。它自动命中，并造成1d4+1力场伤害。你施放该法术时每额外使用一个动作，你射出的碎片增加一个，最大为3个动作发射三个碎片。你为每个碎片分别选择目标。如果你对同一个目标射击超过1个碎片，将伤害合计后再计算伤害加值，减值，抗力，弱点等。

升阶（+2） 你花费的每个动作额外射出一枚碎片。

Gravity Field.name: Gravity Field
Gravity Field.description:
Bending the laws of the Universe to your will, you increase the forces of gravity in an area. All flying creatures in the area descend 40 feet. The entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying and Climbing creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground. Any creature pulled to the ground by a gravity field takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen.

Gravity in the area increases by one step (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity).

Protection.name: 防护术 Protection
Protection.description:
你保护一个生物免受伤害。目标在AC和豁免骰上获得+1状态加值。

升阶（3环级） 你可以选择让该好处也会影响目标@Template[emanation|distance:10]范围内的所有的你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.RawLEPwyT5CtCZ4D]{法术效果：防护术}

Earthbind.name: 地缚术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你使用大地的重量以干扰目标的飞行能力，其效果基于强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，它不会承受坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1轮内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1分钟内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

Pest Form.name: 害兽形态 Pest Form
Pest Form.description:
你变形为超小型动物的战斗形态，例如猫、昆虫、蜥蜴、或者老鼠。你可以选择特定动物的类型（例如老鼠或者螳螂），但这对该形态的体型及数据没有影响。处于该形态时，你获得动物特征且你不能打击。你可以解消该法术。

你获得后续数据和能力：

  • AC=15+你的等级. 忽略你的护甲检定减值和速度减值。
  • 速度 10尺。
  • 对物理伤害弱点5。（如果你在该形态中承受物理伤害，你承受5点额外伤害。）
  • 昏暗视觉和模糊嗅觉30尺。
  • 特技和隐秘调整值+10，除非你自身调整值更高；运动调整值-4。

升阶（4环级） 你可以变成一个飞行动物，例如鸟，这赋予你飞行速度20尺。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ydsLEGjY89Akc4oZ]{法术效果：害兽形态}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Call Spirit.name: 呼唤精魂 Call Spirit
Call Spirit.description:
你掀开了彼世与此世的界限，将精魂（spirit）从其安息之地唤起。你必须呼唤精魂的名字，而且必须准备与精魂相关的物件，比如它生前的随身物品、衣服、或者取自它尸体的残骸。不愿回应你的呼唤的精魂能够尝试1次意志豁免来拒绝；豁免大成功时，另一个骗子精魂会装做你所呼唤的精魂来回应呼唤。如果精魂生前没有见过你，那么它抵抗呼唤的意志豁免DC会降低2点。无论如何，精魂会出现在你面前，其缥缈的外观就如同你想要呼唤的生物一样。在持续时间内的每一分钟，你都能够问精魂一个问题。它会以自己喜欢的方式回答，甚至可以拒绝回答。若精魂不在来世（比如它现在是不死生物）的话，大失败之外的其他结果都会使用仪式失败的效果。

大成功 精魂会十分配合你，哪怕它具有足够的理由来欺骗你，也会在欺骗检定中承受-2的环境减值。

成功 你能够呼唤精魂。

失败 你未能呼唤精魂。

大失败 一个或更多的邪恶精魂（evil spirits）出现并对你发起攻击。

Adhere.name: Adhere
Adhere.description:
You create a molecular bond between an unattended object you touch (or an object you're holding) and another object or surface that object is touching. Pulling the object free of that surface requires a successful [[/act force-open]]{Athletics} check against your spell DC to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open}.

If you instead touch one unoccupied 5-foot square, that surface becomes charged with adhering magic. That space becomes greater difficult terrain.

Divine Wrath.name: 神圣狂怒 Divine Wrath
Divine Wrath.description:
你引导你的神祇的怒火攻击你的敌人。你对区域内敌人造成4d10精魂伤害，基于它们的强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。

大失败 该生物承受全部伤害，并且@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 2}；当其恶心时，也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d10。

Verdant Code.name: Verdant Code
Verdant Code.description: You cause flowering vines or other plant matter to grow from an unattended tech object. Plant matter explodes from the target object, filling all squares within a 20-foot burst. Whenever a creature starts its turn in the area, it takes 2d6 piercing damage (basic Reflex save). On a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round or until it Escapes against your spell DC. The growth covers the object, requiring a creature to succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] to physically access the object for the spell's duration.

Collective Memories.name: 集团记忆 Collective Memories
Collective Memories.description:
你探寻其他人对某个特定主题的记忆、知识、传说、故事和学问。该主题必须是关于某个重要的人、地区、或事物。若该主题仍现存于世，则将你的主要技能检定的成功度提升1级。若你在尝试仪式之前，对该主题的了解只有模糊信息的话，则将你的主要技能检定的成功度降低1级。当你的主题是现存的，却不具有最低限度的信息，这些调整就会彼此抵消。

大成功 在仪式结束后的1小时内，你能整理出一段记忆，这些记忆条理清晰、能将更为准确和实用的信息凸显出来，而非那些被误记的知识或夸张传说。

成功 在仪式结束后的1小时内，你能够知晓一些有用的信息，这些信息有助于进一步调查主题，但它通常不够完整或者令人难以理解。正如普通人的记忆和故事的本质一般，你很可能会知晓多个彼此矛盾的信息。

失败 你未能得到有用的传说。

大失败 你的心智会被自身掌握的海量信息所淹没。你在1星期内无法对现实进行任何感知或回应，只能进行呼吸和睡觉这种必要的活动。然而当你恢复时，你能够重训（retrain）自身的1项技能到学识（Lore）上，该学识的类别取决于你所掌握的对应主题的知识，就如同你花了1个星期进行重训一般。

Summon Fey.name: 召唤精类 Summon Fey
Summon Fey.description:
你召唤一个具有精类特征的生物为你而战，其等级为-1。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Summon Entity.name: 召唤怪形 Summon Entity
Summon Entity.description:
你召唤一个具有异怪（aberration）特征的生物为你而战，其等级为5或更低。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象伪装 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你创造了一个令目标看起来是另一个有相同体型的生物的幻觉。有着相近的身高（6英寸内）和体重（50磅内）。该伪装通常足以掩盖它的身份，但不足以让你假扮另一个特定个人。该法术会改变它的外观和声音，但不会改变仪态。你可以改变其穿着和佩带的物品，例如让它的护甲看起来像是连衣裙。持握的物品不受影响，并且穿戴的物品离开该生物时会回复其本来外观。

施放幻象伪装视为欺骗技能的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{乔装 Impersonate}的设立伪装；这忽视任何目标可能会从扮作不熟悉生物中获得的环境减值，并且会赋予目标在避免他人看破它的伪装的欺骗检定上+4状态加值，并且即使目标未受训也加上它的等级。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（3环级） 你可以伪装成任何与你有相同体型的生物，甚至是特定个人。你必须曾见过特定个人，才能重现其外观，并且要听过它的声音，才能重现其声音。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。如果你以多个生物为目标，你可以为每个目标指定不同的伪装，但都不能伪装成特定个人。你可以单独解消每个伪装，或者一起解消。

升阶（7环级） 如同4环级，但是你可以伪装成特定个人。你必须曾见过特定个人，才能重现其外观，并且要听过它的声音，才能重现其声音。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象伪装}

Logic Bomb.name: Logic Bomb
Logic Bomb.description:
You implant a hazard containing a mind-blowing amount of information into the target. The hazard has a Stealth and Disable DC equal to your spell DC and requires one successful @Check[computers] check to disable. The first time a creature unsuccessfully attempts to access, destroy, or otherwise manipulate the target (such as using the Computers skill, failing to hit with a Strike, or otherwise), logic bomb detonates, and the creature takes 6d6 mental damage with a basic Will save. The spell ends when it's triggered or the duration ends, whichever comes first.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Vital Beacon.name: 活力信标 Vital Beacon
Vital Beacon.description:
生命力自你放射而出，其他人能够通过祈愿而获得治疗。每轮一次，你或者一个盟友可以使用一个交互动作，可以通过用手接触你向你祈愿，并回复生命值。每当信标治愈某人后，其强度会减弱。它对第一个生物回复@Damage[(@item.rank)d10[healing,vitality]|shortLabel]生命值，第二个为@Damage[(@item.rank)d8[healing,vitality]|shortLabel]，第三个为@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[healing,vitality]|shortLabel]，第四个为@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[healing,vitality]|shortLabel]，这之后法术结束。你同时只能有一个活力信标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.WWtSEJGwKY4bQpUn]{Spell Effect: Vital Beacon}

升阶（+1） 该信标在治疗时额外回复一个骰子的生命值，使用和对应阶段的骰子相同的骰子。

Wall of Wind.name: 风墙术 Wall of Wind
Wall of Wind.description:
你创造一层会干扰所有通过事物的暴风墙。这面由旋风组成的墙有5尺厚，60尺长，30尺高。该墙为竖直的，但你可以指定其形态。虽然风墙会搅动空气，但不会阻碍视觉。该墙壁具有下列效果。

  • 来自物理远程攻击的弹药（例如箭，矢，投石索弹丸，以及其他类似大小的物体）无法穿过该墙。更大的远程武器的攻击，例如标枪，如果其路线通过该墙壁，则其在攻击骰上承受-2环境减值。重型远程武器和不创造实体物体的法术效果可以不受减值地通过该墙。
  • 该墙对尝试从地面通过它的生物为困难地形。气体，以及处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form}的生物，无法穿过墙壁。
  • 尝试使用移动动作飞过墙壁的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙。

成功 该飞行生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙，但是该墙为困难地形。

失败 该墙阻挡飞行生物的移动，并且当前动作的剩余移动力被浪费。

大失败 如同失败，并且该生物会被推离该墙10尺。

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Liquid Siphon.name: Liquid Siphon
Liquid Siphon.description:
You drain the moisture out of your target, crumpling them up like an empty beverage can and potentially leaving them a desiccated husk of what they once were. A nonliving target with liquid in its body (such as a vampire, water elemental, or keg of alcohol) can be affected by this spell, but a living creature with no vital liquids is immune. The target creature takes 4d6 bludgeoning damage, depending on the results of its saving throw.

A target that fails its saving throw creates water that flows into your hands or a held container (1 gallon for Tiny, 2 gallons for Small, 4 for Medium, 6 for Large, 8 for Huge). If the target critically fails its saving throw, double this amount.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure As failure, but double damage and the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by 2d6.

Summon Plant or Fungus.name: 召唤植物与真菌 Summon Plant or Fungus
Summon Plant or Fungus.description:
你召唤一个具有植物或者真菌特征的生物为你而战，其等级为-1。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Hydraulic Push.name: 水流冲击 Hydraulic Push
Hydraulic Push.description:
你唤来一团强力的高压水流，撞击目标并令其后退。尝试一次远程法术攻击骰。

大成功 目标承受6d6钝击伤害，并且被击退10尺。

成功 目标承受3d6钝击伤害，并且被击退5尺。

升阶（+1） 该钝击伤害增加2d6。

Stumble.name: Stumble
Stumble.description:
A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Blessed Boundary.name: 圣刃护球 Blessed Boundary
Blessed Boundary.description:
数以百计的神圣力量显现，飞旋在一个防御球体中。这些显现物通常看起来是尖锐的碎片，但通常会有一些基于施法者的神祇的特色。该球体是空心的，这些显现在外边缘构成了2英尺厚的壳。在你施放它时，你能以5尺为增量让爆发范围缩小。该球壳造成掩蔽，并且能够通过固体地面且不影响它。当球创造时，或者生物尝试穿过球壳时，该球壳对每个与其交错的生物造成7d8力场伤害，该生物也会在回合结束时承受伤害，但这仅当它此回合没有由于球壳承受伤害时。该效果由生物的反射豁免决定。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，按照你选择的方向被推离至多10尺，并且结束移动。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，按照你选择的方向被推离至多20尺，并且结束移动。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

New Game.name: New Game
New Game.description:
You draw creatures into a vidgame, digitizing their bodies and minds, including equipment, to play in virtual reality. The genre of the game and effect of the spell depend on who you target when you cast it. Any creature targeted by this spell becomes immune to it for 24 hours, no matter what genre they experience.

  • If you cast the spell targeting yourself and any number of willing allies, the targets enter a relaxing slice-of-life social simulation game where they can perform up to 1 hour of activities for the duration of the spell, including Refocusing, Repairing items, or simply evading an enemy by hiding in this virtual extradimensional space.
  • If you cast this spell targeting yourself or one willing ally, and one enemy, the targets enter a PvP game and are instructed to fight, using their current initiative. For the duration of the spell, either creature can manipulate fate once on each of its turns. This allows it to either roll twice and take the higher result on an attack roll or skill check it attempts against its opponent (a fortune effect) or force the opponent to roll twice on a saving throw against one of its abilities and take the lower result (a misfortune effect). The GM might decide that other genres of games exist that add additional rules or subsystems to resolving the spell. The spell ends if either target becomes unable to act or if they both agree to cease hostilities. Any results of the game, such as damage or conditions, persist after the game is over. If a player dies in this game, they die in real life.
  • If you cast this spell targeting one enemy, the target enters a PvE or puzzle game that traps them until they can complete the game. Once each turn, the target can spend 1 action to attempt a Computers or Perception check against your spell DC to escape the game. Teleportation magic doesn't help the creature escape unless the magic can transport someone into or out of a virtual space. When the spell ends, either because the target escaped or the duration ran out, the target returns to the space it occupied when it was digitized, or to the nearest space if the original is now filled. The GM might decide that other genres of games allow for different skill checks but should only do so if the target has proficiency in the listed skill.

Critical Success The target completes the game and the spell ends.

Success The target makes progress toward completing the game. If the target already made progress, it completes the game and the spell ends.

Failure The target makes no progress toward completing the game.

Critical Failure The target loses the game and has to start over. It loses all progress it made.

Falling Stars.name: 坠星爆 Falling Stars
Falling Stars.description:
区域 4个40尺爆发区域

你将意识延伸至星空，呼唤一系列坠落的流星，它们会在与地面撞击时发生爆炸。为流星选择类型：空爆（音波）、小行星（火）、彗星（寒冷）、或离子体（电）。法术获得你所选择的流星类别的特征。这4个流星的中心10尺爆发区域无法重叠。每个流星在爆炸之前，会对其效果中心的@Template[burst|distance:10]区域的每个生物造成6d10点钝击伤害，然后其爆炸会对@Template[burst|distance:40]区域内的每个生物造成14d6点你所选择的能量伤害。在任意区域内的生物无论被多少个重叠的爆炸囊括在内，都必须尝试一次基础反射豁免，且每种类型的伤害仅承受一次。

升阶（+1） 钝击伤害增加1d10点，能量伤害增加2d6点。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Eldritch Wrath.name: Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
由黑暗组成的触须从你的指尖喷涌而出。你对在射线上的活物造成2d4虚能伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。每个射线上的活物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚能伤害，并且不受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚能伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 该虚能伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Electric Arc.name: 电弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一段电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标承受2d4电击伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Absolute Zero.name: Absolute Zero
Absolute Zero.description:
A swirling vortex flash freezes the air, dealing 10d8 cold damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the start of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} by a layer of ice, and is slowed 1 as long as it's immobilized. The ice is an object with 50 Hit Points, Hardness 5, immunity to cold damage, and vulnerability 10 to fire. It has object immunities and is destroyed if the target Escapes.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8 and the ice's Hit Points increase by 5.

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙术 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面岩石墙壁。你创造一个至多120尺长，20尺高1寸厚的石墙。你可以塑形石墙的路径，将墙壁的每5尺放在方格之间的边界上。该墙壁无需竖直，所以举例而言，你可以用其塑造一座桥，或者一组阶梯。你必须将该墙创造在连续的开放空间中，令其边界不会穿过任何生物或者物体，否则你会失去该法术。

每一段10尺乘10尺的墙壁具有AC10，硬度14，以及50生命值，并且它免疫重击，寒冷伤害，以及精准伤害。一段被摧毁的墙壁可以移动通过，但是因此留下的碎石会令其变成困难地形。

升阶（+2） 每一段墙的生命值增加15。

Entropy Strike.name: Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Wave of Warning.name: Wave of Warning
Wave of Warning.description:
You deter enemies with a wave of hostile intent. The target takes 7d8 nonlethal mental damage, and the target must attempt a Will save. The psychic energy then arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the wave at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target creature is unaffected, and the wave ends with that target.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d8.

Vitality Lash.name: 命能袭 Vitality Lash
Vitality Lash.description:
你用创生熔炉的能量破坏目标的腐败本源。你造成2d6点命能伤害，这需进行一次基础强韧豁免。如果该生物在豁免中大失败，直到你的下个回合开始前，他还会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6。

Summon Dragon.name: 召唤巨龙 Summon Dragon
Summon Dragon.description:
你召唤一个具有龙特征的生物为你而战，其等级为5或更低。如果该龙具有魔法根源特征（奥术、神术、异能、原能），你必须使用对应的根源来施放召唤巨龙才能召唤它。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Resurrect.name: 起死回生 Resurrect
Resurrect.description:
You attempt to call forth the target's soul and return it to its body. This requires the target's body to be present and relatively intact. The target must have died within the past year. If @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} has decided that the target's time has come or the target doesn't wish to return, this ritual automatically fails, but you discover this after the successful Religion check and can end the ritual without paying the cost.

Critical Success You resurrect the target. They return to life with full Hit Points and the same spells prepared and points in their pools they had when they died, and still suffering from any long-term debilitations of the old body. The target meets an agent of their deity during the resurrection who inspires them, granting them a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks for 1 week. The target is also permanently changed in some way by their time in the afterlife, such as gaining a slight personality shift, a streak of white in the hair, or a strange new birthmark.

Success As critical success, except the target returns to life with 1 Hit Point and no spells prepared or points in any pools, and still is affected by any long-term debilitations of the old body. Instead of inspiring them, the character's time in the Boneyard has left them temporarily debilitated. The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 week; these conditions can't be removed or reduced by any means until the week has passed.

Failure Your attempt is unsuccessful.

Critical Failure Something goes horribly wrong-an evil spirit possesses the body, the body transforms into a special kind of undead, or some worse fate befalls the target.

Heightened (6th) You can resurrect a target of up to 12th level, and the base cost is 1,250 credits.

Heightened (7th) You can use resurrect even with only a small portion of the body; the ritual creates a new body on a success or critical success. The target must have died within the past decade. The ritual requires four secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 14th level, and the base cost is 2,000 credits.

Heightened (8th) As 7th rank, but the target can be up to 16th level and the base cost is 3,000 credits.

Heightened (9th) You can use resurrect even without the body as long as you know the target's name and have touched a portion of its body at any time. The target must have died within the past century, and it doesn't gain the negative conditions on a success. The ritual requires eight secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 18th level, and the base cost is 6,000 credits.

Heightened (10th) As 9th rank, except it doesn't matter how long ago the target died. The ritual requires 16 secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 20th level, and the ritual's base cost is 10,000 credits.

Planar Tether.name: 次元拴绳 Planar Tether
Planar Tether.description:
你将目标固定到其当前位面。当目标受到次元拴绳影响时，该法术会尝试反制任何传送效果，以及任何移动目标到另一个位面的效果。次元拴绳的持续时间由目标的意志豁免决定。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 该持续时间为1分钟。

失败 该持续时间为10分钟。

大失败 该持续时间为1小时。

Summon Construct.name: 召唤构装体 Summon Construct
Summon Construct.description:
你召唤一个具有构装体特征的生物为你而战，其等级为-1。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出

Summon Celestial.name: 召唤天族 Summon Celestial
Summon Celestial.description:
You summon a creature that has the celestial trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you. The GM might determine your deity restricts the specific types of celestials you can summon in certain cases.

Heightened As listed in the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{summon} trait.

Summon Elemental.name: 召唤元素 Summon Elemental
Summon Elemental.description:
你召唤一个具有元素特征的生物为你而战，其等级为1或更低。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出

Energy Aegis.name: 辟能圣盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你使用长效的强力能量护盾保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能、以及虚能伤害的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：辟能圣盾}

升阶（9环级） 该抗力提升到10。

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Akashic Fount.name: Akashic Fount
Akashic Fount.description: You open the target's mind to the Akashic Record to draw in feelings, memories, and knowledge contained within that astral repository. Choose one Lore skill. The target temporarily gains the same proficiency rank in that skill as your proficiency rank in Occultism.

Instant Virus.name: Instant Virus
Instant Virus.description:
Your touch installs a dangerous self-replicating virus that disrupts a technological creature's programming. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Failure The target is glitching 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Telekinetic Maneuver.name: 念动战技 Telekinetic Maneuver
Telekinetic Maneuver.description: 你通过一股猛烈的念动力移动一个敌人或者其携带的事物。你可以对目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{卸武 Disarm}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞 Shove}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{移位 Reposition}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{摔绊 Trip}，使用法术攻击骰，而不是运动检定。

Carcinization.name: Carcinization
Carcinization.description:
You manipulate the target's genetic code and accelerate the inevitable, pressuring the target to undergo carcinization and become a crab. A willing target fully transforms into a crab, as if it had cast animal form heightened to the same rank as this spell and using the following statistics.

  • Crab

    • Speed 25 feet, swim 15 feet
    • Melee 1 big claw, Damage 2d8 piercing
    • Melee 1 claw (agile), Damage 2d4 piercing.
    • Can breathe air and water.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.16Li37zRYKClxqsv]{Spell Effect: Carcinization}

Unwilling targets must instead attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of a crab, its appendages turning into claws and causing it to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Failure The target transforms into a partial crab-like being, becoming clumsy 1, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into a partial crab-like being and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Corrosive Haze.name: Corrosive Haze
Corrosive Haze.description:
You unleash a cloud of corrosive nanites. Creatures that start their turn in the area take 6d8 acid damage and 1d6 persistent acid damage with a basic Fortitude save. The nanites also corrode any unattended objects in the area, dealing 3d8 acid damage. Each round you Sustain the spell, you can move the cloud up to 10 feet in any direction. You can Dismiss the spell.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

Scan Environment.name: Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Sleep.name: 睡眠术 Sleep
Sleep.description:
区域中的每个生物垂头歪脑昏昏欲睡。由于该法术@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}的生物不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，也不会松开其持握的东西。该法术不会令生物无法通过察觉醒来，并因此限制其在战斗中的能力。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在察觉检定上承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1分钟后仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

大失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1小时候仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

升阶（4环级） 目标在失败时失去意识1轮，在大失败时失去意识1分钟。它们会倒地，并松开其持握的东西，并且它们无法尝试察觉检定以醒来。当持续时间结束时，该生物会正常睡着，而不是自动醒来。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Impaling Spike.name: 穿心铁刺 Impaling Spike
Impaling Spike.description:
你创造一根铁刺，从目标生物的下方穿出，并且可能将其贯穿。该刺桩由寒铁制成，造成8d6穿刺伤害。目标必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 目标躲开了铁刺，并且不受影响。

成功 目标被尖刺划中，承受一半伤害。

失败 目标被贯穿了一条腿或者其他非致命的身体部位。目标承受完整伤害，并且如果它站在坚实地面上，也会获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。它可以尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}，DC是你的法术DC。当它被贯穿时，会在其每轮结束时，承受任何来自寒铁弱点的伤害。

大失败 如失败，但是该生物的重要脏器或者身体重心被穿透，承受双倍伤害，并且在被贯穿时处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Forge Drift Beacon.name: Forge Drift Beacon
Forge Drift Beacon.description:
You consecrate a space station to the deity Triune by installing sacred hardware and syncing it to the hyperspace plane of the Drift. It becomes a Drift beacon that allows swifter travel to the surrounding region of space. The ritual requires at least 3 casters (to represent Triune's tripartite nature), but as many as 12 casters have been known to regularly perform this ritual. If the number of casters is not a multiple of 3, the ritual automatically fails.

Critical Success The forging succeeds, and the entire space station becomes consecrated to Triune, gaining the effects of the consecrate ritual for a number of years equal to the number of casters who performed the ritual.

Success The forging succeeds.

Failure The forging fails.

Critical Failure The forging fails spectacularly and causes a glitch in Triune's code, which might have tangible effects on the space station, like glitch gremlin infestations, a visit from a spectra repair squad, inexplicable technical difficulties becoming rampant, or even planar glitches. For at least 1 year, further attempts to forge a Drift beacon at the site fail.

Peaceful Bubble.name: 安眠气泡 Peaceful Bubble
Peaceful Bubble.description:
由变幻溢彩的符文组成的不透明外壳笼罩了区域，形成一个气泡。在你施放它时，你能选择缩小爆发范围（单位为10尺）。这些符文不会妨碍通过，但是在泡泡内的人无法认知到外面的事物，反过来也是。侦测和探知效果也会类似地被妨碍。

在泡泡内睡觉的生物免疫由法术送来的梦境。睡眠8小时的人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed}状态会减少2而非1。

Adaptive Camouflage.name: Adaptive Camouflage
Adaptive Camouflage.description:
Trigger You are caught in the area of a hostile effect.

This magic takes advantage of disorienting explosions and gunfire to give its caster an opportunity to hide. You become undetected to all creatures that rely on visual senses unless they can see @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures. You Step. If you have cover, greater cover, or concealment, attempt a Stealth check to Hide. The invisibility then ends, and you either become observed or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to creatures as determined by your check to Hide, if you made one. If you remain in the area of the trigger, you gain a +2 status bonus to this Stealth check. If you are no longer in the area of the trigger, you gain a +2 status bonus to your Reflex save (if any) against the triggering effect.

Darkvision.name: 黑暗视觉 Darkvision
Darkvision.description:
你赋予自身在黑暗区域中超自然的视觉。你获得黑暗视觉。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.IXS15IQXYCZ8vsmX]{法术效果：黑暗视觉}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.inNfTmtWpsxeGBI9]{法术效果：黑暗视觉（24小时）}

升阶（3环级） 该法术的射程为接触，目标为一个自愿生物。

升阶（5环级） 该法术的射程为接触，目标为一个自愿生物。法术持续时间为直到下次你进行的日常准备。

Primal Call.name: 原初的呼唤 Primal Call
Primal Call.description: 该仪式的功能就如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vgy00hnqxN9VoeoF]{异界侍从 Planar Servitor}一般，不过你需要制作仙女环，以及呼唤的是100英里内的一个动物、野兽、精类、菌类或植物。

Shadow Prison.name: Shadow Prison
Shadow Prison.description:
You cause memories of the target's resentment, regret, and other negative feelings to engorge its shadow until it grows large enough to swallow them whole. The target attempts a Will saving throw. The target is then immune to this spell for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target resists the spell before it's completely swallowed up, but shadowy tendrils cling to it, making the target @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is swallowed by its own shadow until the beginning of your next turn. The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, cannot experience or interact with the outside world, and cannot be targeted by any attacks or other effects.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target is swallowed for 1 minute.

Read Omens.name: 阅读机运 Read Omens
Read Omens.description: 你窥视未来。选择一个会在1周内发生的特定目的，事件，或者活动。你会获得一段晦涩的线索或者建议，它通常是诗歌或者预言，并且会在选择的事件中帮助到你。

Metamorphosis.name: 形体万变 Metamorphosis
Metamorphosis.description:
借由你对变形魔法的掌握，你无止尽地用形态覆盖住形态。你将自身变为任意的，你通过自身法术库或者你能准备的8环级或者更低的变形法术所能变成的形态（包括任何8环级或者更低的你所知的法术的升阶版本）。你获得40临时生命值，而非该形态通常赋予你的生命值。

你可以维持该法术，转变成一个你在此次形体万变中没有使用的新形态。这会重新充满你从该法术获得的临时生命值。

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮着的魔法手掌，它可以隐形或者宛如幽灵，它能抓住目标物体并向着任意方向缓慢漂浮至多20尺。当你维持法术时，你能够将物体移动额外20尺。若物体位于空中之时法术结束，那么该物体便会坠落。

升阶（3环级） 你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个2负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

Explosion of Rot.name: Explosion of Rot
Explosion of Rot.description:
A giant pustule swells and explodes, coating everything around it in life-draining rot. Creatures and plants in the area take 6d6 poison damage and must attempt a Reflex save. Foliage and plant matter in the area damaged by the spell no longer provide cover.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, @Damage[(floor((@item.rank - 2)/2))d6[persistent,poison]] damage, and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 2d6, and the persistent damage on a critical failure increases by 1d6.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Cleanse Cuisine.name: 净化菜肴 Cleanse Cuisine
Cleanse Cuisine.description:
你将区域内的所有食物和饮料变为可口的饭菜，把清水变为红酒或其他可口的饮品，或者增强食物的味道和配料进而使其变为美味佳肴。你还能够选择移除食物中的所有毒害和污染物。该法术不能防止后续造成的污染、自然造成的腐败或变质、也不能让食物变得更有营养。

升阶（+2） 将另外1立方尺的区域添加到法术区域中，它必须与其余法术区域相接。

Void Whispers.name: Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Foresight.name: 预警术 Foresight
Foresight.description:
你获得一种能知晓法术目标即将遇到的危险的第六感。如果对于法术目标你选择一个生物而不是自身，你会创造一个精神链接；通过该链接你能告知目标危险将至。该链接是一个心灵效果。由于该法术需要你处理大量的信息，你无法令超过一个预警术同时生效。再次施放预警术会结束之前的预警术。当预警术生效时，目标在其先攻骰上获得+2状态加值，并且对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{无踪 Undetected} 生物或者被夹击时不视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}。除此之外，你获得下列反应动作： @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VOEWhPQfN3lvHivK]{预警 Foresight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.X9Na6IK8FSPcTuoc]{法术效果：预警术}

Speak with Plants.name: 植物交谈 Speak with Plants
Speak with Plants.description:
你能向植物和真菌提出问题和得到回答，但是法术不会让植物变得比平时更加友善或获得更高的智能。大多数植物和真菌对周遭的世界都具有独特的视点，因此它们不会意识到生物的具体细节，也不会知晓附近地区以外的大千世界。狡猾的植物或真菌怪物的沟通表现得简短且模棱两可，而缺乏智能的植物通常会发表无意义的意见。

升阶（4环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你施放一道神圣能量的射线。对目标尝试一次远程法术攻击，对抗目标的AC。命中时，该目标承受2d4精魂伤害（在重击时造成双倍伤害）。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Suggestion.name: 暗示术 Suggestion
Suggestion.description:
你的甜言蜜语令生物难以抗拒。你向目标指示一系列动作，其用语对目标而言必须是一系列合理的动作，并且它不可以招致自毁或者明显违抗目标自身愿望。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你尝试控制它。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标立即按照你的指示行动。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或者直到目标完成一个有终点的指示，或者直到指示变得会招致自毁，或具有其他明显的负面效果。

大失败 如同失败，但基本持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Scrying.name: 探知术 Scrying
Scrying.description:
你使用魔法探测所选择的生物。探知类似@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{鹰眼术 Clairvoyance}，但其影像没有那么精确，无法用以传送术以及其他类似法术。你在目标上方直接创造一个眼睛，而不是在500尺内的地点创造一个眼睛。当你选择一个目标时，你要么了解其名字，要么接触其一个所有物或者其身体一部分。如果你没有遇见过目标，探知的DC减少2，并且如果你不知道目标的特征（例如你在犯罪现场发现了一颗未知生物的牙），该DC改为减少10。

探知的效果基于目标的意志豁免骰。

大成功 法术失败，并且目标暂时免疫1星期。目标也会瞥见你，并且了解到你的大致距离和方向。

成功 该法术结束，并且目标暂时免疫1天。

失败 该法术成功。

大失败 该法术成功，并且眼睛会随着目标移动，每轮移动至多60尺。

Disintegrate.name: 解离术 Disintegrate
Disintegrate.description:
一道黑色的光迹飞向你的目标，而在接触目标时突然增强为强大破坏光束。对目标尝试一次法术攻击。如果你命中一件物体，或者力场构造（例如力墙），它会无需豁免立即被摧毁，除非它是一件神器或者是同等的物品。一次施法能够摧毁不超过10尺立方的物质。如果你命中一个生物，它造成12d10伤害（没有伤害类型）并且有一次基础强韧豁免。如果你重击，目标的强韧豁免骰结果会得到低一级的结果。被减少到0HP的生物会化作细微粉尘；其装备会保留。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d10。

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.description:
You ignite a sudden spark of electricity that surges into a technological creature or object. You de-energize an item with the tech trait or disrupt a creature with the tech trait, with effects based on the target being a creature or object.

  • Creature If your target is a creature with the tech trait, it attempts a Will save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.
  • Object If you target an attended object, the creature with the object attempts a Will save. On a success, the object loses half of its maximum charges. On a failure, or if you target an unattended object, the object loses all its remaining charges.

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Cloying Shadows.name: Cloying Shadows
Cloying Shadows.description:
You command creatures' shadows to writhe and write and rebel against their owners. Each creature in the area takes 6d6 cold damage.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The cold damage increases by 2d6.

Retrocognition.name: 回溯过去 Retrocognition
Retrocognition.description:
你开启神识以接受心灵回响，并获得过去在你所在位置发生的事情的印象。回溯过去会显示从前一天到法术持续时间前一分钟所发生事件的心灵印象，然后会显示再前一天到再前一分钟，以此类推。这些回响并不会如图像一般展现，但是会展示一些表现此时的情绪和对过去情况的晦涩暗示的印象。如果你通过一个印象看到了痛苦或混乱的事件，你必须通过一个DC30甚至50的意志豁免，由该时间的严重程度决定，否则该法术结束。GM决定该时间是否痛苦，并决定该DC。

升阶（8环级） 你每分钟专注会获得在之前一年发生的事件的印象，而不是之前一天的，但细节非常模糊，令你更难从所有事件中找到最为重要的那个。

升阶（9环级） 你每分钟专注会获得在之前一世纪发生的事件的印象，而不是之前一天的，但细节非常模糊，令你更难从所有事件中找到最为重要的那个。

Ghostly Carrier.name: 幽灵触媒 Ghostly Carrier
Ghostly Carrier.description: 你创造一个你选择的超小型、半实体的形体。它会在持续时间中漂浮在你的附近。当你施放一个具有接触射程的法术时，你可以使用触媒在射程中移动，传递该法术，然后回到你这里。如果触媒必须尝试一次法术攻击骰，它使用你通常情况下的加值。触媒具有你的AC和豁免，并且任何伤害都会将其摧毁。

Genetic Regeneration.name: Genetic Regeneration
Genetic Regeneration.description:
You imbue the target's genetic code with a stimulating regenerative property that begins healing its wounds. The target temporarily gains regeneration 7, which restores 7 Hit Points to it at the start of each of its turns. While it has regeneration, the target can't die from taking damage, and its dying condition can't increase to a value that would kill it (this stops most creatures' dying condition at dying 3), though if its wounded value becomes 4 or higher, it stays @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until its wounds are treated. If the target takes acid or fire damage, its regeneration deactivates until after the end of its next turn.

Once during the spell's duration, the creature can forgo healing Hit Points that round to regrow one damaged or ruined organ or reattach a severed body part by spending an Interact action to hold the body part to the area it was severed from.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4cFhz9knnHUHj3wi]{Spell Effect: Genetic Regeneration}

Heightened (+1) Increase the regeneration value by 2.

Animate Object.name: 活化物体 Animate Object
Animate Object.description:
You transform the target into an animated object with a level up to that allowed by the Creature Creation Rituals table and of a type corresponding to the object (so a broom would become an animated broom).

Critical Success The target becomes an animated object of the appropriate type. If it's at least 4 levels lower than you, you can make it a minion. This gives it the minion trait, meaning it can use 2 actions when you command it, and commanding it is a single action that has the auditory and concentrate traits. You can have a maximum of four minions under your control. If it doesn't become a minion, you can give it one simple command. It pursues that goal single-mindedly, ignoring any of your subsequent commands.

Success As critical success, except an animated object that doesn't become your minion stays in place and attacks anyone that attacks it or tries to steal or move it, rather than following your command.

Failure You fail to create the animated object.

Critical Failure You create the animated object, but it goes berserk and attempts to destroy you.

Creatures Creation Rituals
